name: webflow-to-astro
description: Webflow export → Astro pipeline (HTML → Tailwind v4 → Astro 5 with content collections)

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const cfg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('project.config.json','utf8'));for(const d of ['output-'+cfg.name+'-tailwind-v4','astro-'+cfg.name+'/dist'])fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('cleaned build outputs for',cfg.name)"
scripts.pipeline: npm run clean && npm run fetch && npm run maps && npm run tw && npm run post && npm run astro && npm run optimize && npm run astro:build
scripts.pipeline:dev: npm run clean && npm run fetch && npm run maps && npm run tw && npm run post && npm run astro && npm run optimize && npm run astro:dev
